name: Anomaly Detection & Monitoring
tagline: Phat hien bat thuong va giam sat lien tuc — tu gian lan giao dich den loi cam bien, tu xam nhap mang den drift mo hinh, bao ve he thong truoc nhung gi khong the du doan
description: Anomaly Detection & Monitoring la linh vuc phat hien cac mau bat thuong trong du lieu — tu diem bat thuong don le den bat thuong tap the trong chuoi thoi gian, tu gian lan tai chinh den hong hoc thiet bi san xuat. Ky thuat trai dai tu phuong phap thong ke co dien (Z-score, Grubbs) qua machine learning (Isolation Forest, LOF, One-Class SVM) den deep learning hien dai (Autoencoder, VAE, Anomaly Transformer). Voi stack open-source chin muoi (PyOD 40+ algorithms, Alibi Detect, Kafka, Flink), he thong co the trien khai tu batch phan tich hang ngay den streaming phat hien real-time duoi 100ms. Cho thi truong Viet Nam — noi ngan hang mat $200M+/nam do gian lan, 8,000+ nha may can giam sat chat luong, va thuong mai dien tu xu ly 2.5 ty buu kien/nam — lam chu B07 la bat buoc cho bat ky nen tang AI nghiem tuc nao.
description_paragraphs: Anomaly Detection & Monitoring la linh vuc giao giua Statistical Learning, Machine Learning, va Signal Processing, tap trung vao viec phat hien cac data points, events, hoac patterns lech dang ke khoi hanh vi binh thuong. Linh vuc bao gom 8 sub-fields: Point Anomaly, Contextual Anomaly, Collective Anomaly, Time-Series, Streaming, Graph, Image/Video, va Log/Event anomaly detection. Stack cong nghe hoan toan open-source va chin muoi: PyOD (40+ algorithms, MIT), Alibi Detect (production-grade voi drift detection), Kafka + Flink cho streaming, PyTorch cho deep models, Prometheus + Grafana cho monitoring — TRL 8, da duoc chung minh tai Netflix, Uber, Stripe.

Tai Viet Nam, B07 co diem kha thi 7.3/10 (CONDITIONAL GO) voi Market Demand cao nhat (9/10): ngan hang mat $200M+/nam do gian lan va dang chiu ap luc tu NHNN trien khai AI fraud detection truoc 2027; 8,000+ nha may can predictive quality control (giam defect 15-30%); thuong mai dien tu 2.5 ty buu kien/nam can logistics anomaly detection. Tuy nhien, Data Availability (6/10) va Implementation Risk (6/10) la thach thuc: du lieu bat thuong co nhan cuc ky hiem tai VN, va ty le false positive 30-50% cua phuong phap unsupervised gay 'alert fatigue' nghiem trong.

Chien luoc trien khai: bat dau voi Banking Fraud Detection lam beachhead (willingness to pay cao nhat, $20K-100K/nam SaaS), dung kien truc batch-first (PostgreSQL + PyOD + MLflow + Grafana, $500-1,500/thang infrastructure). Them streaming (Kafka + Flink) chi khi client yeu cau latency <1 giay. Dieu kien GO: can pilot client ngan hang cung cap labeled data, tich hop SHAP explainability tu ngay dau (bat buoc cho regulatory compliance NHNN), va xay Vietnam Anomaly Benchmark Dataset lam competitive moat.

core_concepts.name: Diem bat thuong (Point Anomaly)
core_concepts.definition: Mot data instance don le lech dang ke khoi phan con lai cua dataset. Scoring function s(x) > tau voi tau duoc chon de kiem soat ty le false positive alpha. Vi du: giao dich $50,000 khi binh thuong <$200. Phuong phap: Z-score, Grubbs' test, k-NN distance.

core_concepts.name: Bat thuong theo ngu canh (Contextual Anomaly)
core_concepts.definition: Data instance chi bat thuong trong mot ngu canh cu the: x = (x_c, x_b) la bat thuong khi p(x_b|x_c) < epsilon, du p(x_b) marginally co the binh thuong. Vi du: nhiet do 35°C binh thuong mua he nhung bat thuong mua dong. Dac biet quan trong cho time-series.

core_concepts.name: Bat thuong tap the (Collective Anomaly)
core_concepts.definition: Nhom data instances bat thuong khi xet chung, du tung instance rieng le co the binh thuong. p(S) << tich p(x_i). Vi du: mot goi tin mang binh thuong, nhung hang ngan goi giong nhau trong 1 giay = DDoS attack. Can phuong phap xet subsequences, subgraphs.

core_concepts.name: Nguyen ly Isolation (Isolation Forest Principle)
core_concepts.definition: Anomalies it va khac biet, nen can it splits de co lap qua random partitioning. Score: s(x,n) = 2^(-E[h(x)]/c(n)), voi h(x) la path length trong iTree. Thoi gian tuyen tinh O(t*psi*log(psi)). Subsample psi=256 chong masking/swamping. Paradigm shift: co lap bat thuong thay vi mo hinh binh thuong.

core_concepts.name: Sai so Tai tao (Autoencoder Reconstruction Error)
core_concepts.definition: Autoencoder hoc nen du lieu binh thuong qua bottleneck encoder-decoder. Anomaly score: a(x) = ||x - g_phi(f_theta(x))||^2. Bat thuong khong khop voi patterns da hoc → sai so tai tao cao. Variants: Denoising AE, Sparse AE, VAE (anomaly score = -ELBO). Hieu qua cho high-dimensional data (images, sensors).

core_concepts.name: Phat hien bat thuong Chuoi thoi gian (Time-Series Anomaly Detection)
core_concepts.definition: Xu ly thach thuc rieng cua temporal data: autocorrelation, trend, seasonality, non-stationarity. Phuong phap chu dao: model-residual e_t = y_t - y_hat_t, flag khi |e_t| > k*sigma_e. STL decomposition: Y_t = T_t + S_t + R_t. Deep learning: LSTM, Temporal CNN, Anomaly Transformer.

core_concepts.name: Phat hien bat thuong Streaming (Streaming Anomaly Detection)
core_concepts.definition: Phat hien tren luong du lieu lien tuc voi rang buoc: bo nho han che, xu ly mot lan, latency thap. Thach thuc chinh: concept drift — phan phoi du lieu thay doi theo thoi gian. Algorithms: ADWIN (adaptive windowing), Half-Space Trees, xStream (random projections + count-min sketches). Can phan biet anomaly vs novelty vs drift.

core_concepts.name: Phat hien bat thuong Da bien (Multivariate Anomaly Detection)
core_concepts.definition: Phat hien bat thuong chi hien thi qua tuong tac nhieu bien — kiem tra tung bien rieng le se bo sot. PCA-based: a(x) = sum((v_j^T * x)^2) cho minor components. Mahalanobis: a(x) = (x-mu)^T * Sigma^-1 * (x-mu). Thach thuc: curse of dimensionality lam distance concentrate trong khong gian cao chieu.

core_concepts.name: Nguong va Quan ly Canh bao (Threshold & Alert Management)
core_concepts.definition: Chuyen anomaly score thanh quyet dinh hanh dong. Ba chien luoc: Static (fixed percentile, vd score > 0.95), Dynamic (thich ung theo phan phoi score gan day), Multi-level (Warning 0.85 → Critical 0.95 → Emergency 0.99). Alert fatigue la van de #1 — ty le false positive 30-50% cho unsupervised methods khien operators bo qua moi canh bao.

core_concepts.name: Vong phan hoi & Drift Detection (Feedback Loop & Model Drift)
core_concepts.definition: Khong co feedback loop, mo hinh suy giam trong vai tuan. Can: labeling UI tich hop dashboard, phan biet 'khong bat thuong' vs 'bat thuong nhung khong can hanh dong', retrain trigger theo so luong labels. Drift detection (Alibi Detect) phat hien distribution shift, trigger retrain trong 24h. Budget 30% engineering effort cho model maintenance.

algorithms.name: Isolation Forest
algorithms.complexity: Training: O(t*psi*log(psi)); Scoring: O(t*log(psi)) moi diem
pros: Thoi gian tuyen tinh — scale hang trieu records
Khong can tinh distance hay density
Subsample chong masking/swamping
It hyperparameters (t, psi, contamination)
cons: Axis-aligned splits kho voi feature interactions (can Extended IF)
Nhay cam voi features khong lien quan
Khong tich hop labeled anomalies native
use_cases: First-choice baseline cho moi bai toan
key_papers: Liu, F.T., Ting, K.M., Zhou, Z.-H. (2008). Isolation Forest. ICDM.

algorithms.name: One-Class SVM (OC-SVM)
algorithms.complexity: Training: O(n^2) den O(n^3); Scoring: O(n_sv * d) moi diem
pros: Nen tang ly thuyet vung (Statistical Learning Theory)
Linh hoat qua kernel (RBF, polynomial)
Nu parameter truc tiep kiem soat ty le outlier
cons: Nhay cam voi kernel va hyperparameter
use_cases: Dataset nho-vua, normal class ro rang
Chieu trung binh voi kernel phu hop
key_papers: Scholkopf, B. et al. (2001). Estimating the support of a high-dimensional distribution.

algorithms.name: Local Outlier Factor (LOF)
algorithms.complexity: O(n^2) naive; O(n*log(n)) voi spatial indexing
pros: Bat local anomalies ma global methods bo sot
Xu ly clusters voi density khac nhau
Score LOF truc quan (ty le density)
use_cases: Datasets co clusters density khac nhau
key_papers: Breunig, M.M. et al. (2000). LOF: Identifying density-based local outliers. SIGMOD.

algorithms.name: DBSCAN / HDBSCAN Anomaly Detection
algorithms.complexity: O(n*log(n)) voi spatial indexing; O(n^2) worst-case
pros: Khong gia dinh so clusters
Xu ly cluster hinh dang bat ky
HDBSCAN GLOSH score lien tuc va robust
Noise points la phat hien bat thuong tu nhien
cons: DBSCAN can tune epsilon va MinPts can than
Vanilla DBSCAN chi co binary (noise hay khong)
use_cases: Khi can clustering va anomaly detection cung luc
key_papers: Ester, M. et al. (1996). DBSCAN. KDD.
Campello, R.J.G.B. et al. (2013). HDBSCAN. PAKDD.

algorithms.name: Autoencoder / VAE Anomaly Detection
algorithms.complexity: Training: O(epochs*n*d*k); Inference: O(d*k) moi sample
pros: Hieu qua cho high-dimensional data (images, sensors, time series)
VAE cung cap probabilistic anomaly score
Bat cau truc phi tuyen ma PCA bo sot
cons: Can du lieu training chu yeu la normal (semi-supervised)
key_papers: Kingma, D.P. & Welling, M. (2014). Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes. ICLR.
An, J. & Cho, S. (2015). VAE-based anomaly detection using reconstruction probability.

algorithms.name: Anomaly Transformer
algorithms.complexity: O(n^2*d) attention per layer (n sequence length, d model dim)
pros: Bat ca local va global temporal dependencies
Association discrepancy la anomaly criterion moi
State-of-art tren nhieu time-series benchmarks
cons: O(n^2) attention costly cho sequences dai
use_cases: Batch analysis cho complex temporal patterns
key_papers: Xu, J. et al. (2022). Anomaly Transformer: Time Series Anomaly Detection with Association Discrepancy. ICLR.

algorithms.name: ADWIN + Half-Space Trees (Streaming)
algorithms.complexity: ADWIN: O(log(W)) per update; HS-Trees: O(max_depth) per point
pros: Xu ly concept drift tu dong (ADWIN adaptive window)
Constant memory cho streaming
Khong can retrain — incremental update
cons: Do chinh xac thap hon batch methods
ADWIN chi phat hien mean shift (khong phai variance)
key_papers: Bifet, A. & Gavalda, R. (2007). Learning from Time-Changing Data with Adaptive Windowing. SDM.
Tan, S.C. et al. (2011). Fast Anomaly Detection for Streaming Data. IJCAI.

algorithms.name: Statistical Methods (Z-score, Grubbs, IQR)
algorithms.complexity: O(n) cho Z-score/IQR; O(n*log(n)) cho Grubbs iterative
pros: Don gian, de hieu, de giai thich (regulatory-friendly)
Khong can training data
Rat nhanh — production tu 1950s
Baseline tot de so sanh voi ML methods
cons: Chi univariate — bo sot multivariate anomalies
key_papers: Grubbs, F.E. (1950). Sample criteria for testing outlying observations.

algorithms.name: Deep SAD / DevNet (Semi-supervised)
pros: Tan dung labeled anomalies (du it) de cai thien performance dang ke
Deep SAD: one-class objective + labeled guidance
DevNet: deviation network — score truc tiep
cons: Can it nhat vai tram labeled anomalies
Van can du lieu normal nhieu
use_cases: Fraud detection voi historical fraud labels
Manufacturing voi defect labels tu QC
Bat ky domain co partial labels
key_papers: Ruff, L. et al. (2020). Deep Semi-Supervised Anomaly Detection. ICLR.
Pang, G. et al. (2019). DevNet. KDD.

recommended.rationale: Distributed event streaming platform cho real-time data ingestion tu nhieu nguon (sensors, logs, transactions). Production-proven tai LinkedIn, Netflix. Ket hop Debezium cho CDC tu databases.

alternatives.recommended: RabbitMQ / Amazon Kinesis / Azure Event Hubs
alternatives.rationale: RabbitMQ don gian hon cho team nho. Kinesis/Event Hubs cho cloud-native. Chi dung managed services khi khong co Kafka expertise.

recommended.rationale: Stateful stream processing cho real-time feature engineering va windowed aggregations. CEP (Complex Event Processing) cho rule-based pattern matching. Latency <100ms cho fraud detection.

alternatives.recommended: Spark Structured Streaming / Kafka Streams / Apache Beam
alternatives.rationale: Kafka Streams nhe hon cho simple transforms. Spark Streaming khi da co Spark ecosystem. Beam cho portability.

recommended.rationale: Open-source feature store cho ML: shared feature definitions, point-in-time joins, online/offline serving. Mien phi. Tranh feature drift giua training va serving.

alternatives.recommended: Tecton / Hopsworks / Vertex AI Feature Store
alternatives.rationale: Tecton managed; Hopsworks cho on-premise. Chi xet khi Feast khong du cho scale.

recommended.rationale: 40+ algorithms trong unified API. MIT license. Isolation Forest, LOF, OCSVM, Autoencoders, Deep SAD — tat ca tu mot thu vien. DEFAULT cho moi POC va baseline.

alternatives.rationale: Alibi Detect cho production (drift detection tich hop). River cho streaming incremental learning. scikit-learn cho Isolation Forest va basic methods.

recommended.rationale: Autoencoder, VAE, Anomaly Transformer models. Dynamic computation graph de debug. TorchScript/ONNX cho deployment. Community lon nhat cho anomaly detection research.

alternatives.rationale: TensorFlow khi can TFLite (edge deployment). JAX cho research performance-critical.

recommended.rationale: Tu dong extract 700+ statistical features tu time series. Giam 80% effort feature engineering thu cong. Ket hop pandas + numpy cho batch processing.

alternatives.rationale: Catch22 cho 22 core features (nhanh hon tsfresh). Polars thay pandas cho datasets lon.

recommended.rationale: BentoML cho don gian: package models as APIs voi batching. Triton cho GPU-accelerated high-throughput. Redis cache anomaly scores va features.

alternatives.recommended: TorchServe / Seldon Core / KServe / Ray Serve
alternatives.rationale: Seldon Core cho Kubernetes-native. Ray Serve khi da dung Ray ecosystem.

recommended.rationale: Experiment tracking, model registry, deployment. Self-hosted mien phi. Track anomaly detection configs, threshold parameters, performance metrics qua thoi gian.

alternatives.rationale: W&B cho visualization tot hon nhung SaaS. ClearML mien phi self-hosted alternative.

recommended.rationale: Prometheus thu thap metrics (model performance, anomaly rates, latency). Grafana dashboards va alerting rules. Alertmanager route canh bao den Slack/PagerDuty. Self-hosted, mien phi.

alternatives.rationale: ELK cho log anomaly analysis. Datadog all-in-one nhung $23+/host/thang. InfluxDB cho time-series metrics chuyen biet.

recommended.rationale: BAT BUOC cho banking vertical (NHNN regulatory compliance). SHAP giai thich moi anomaly score: feature nao dong gop nhieu nhat. Isolation Forest + SHAP la combo uu tien cho regulated verticals.

alternatives.rationale: Alibi Explain tich hop Alibi Detect. Captum cho PyTorch deep models.

recommended.rationale: Open-source labeling tool. Tich hop vao feedback loop: operators label true positive/false positive tu alert dashboard. Can thiet cho semi-supervised model improvement.

alternatives.rationale: Prodigy nhanh cho NLP/tabular. Custom UI khi can embed vao existing dashboard.

recommended.rationale: Async-native, OpenAPI auto-docs, Pydantic validation. Scoring API endpoint /score voi latency <50ms. Health check va metrics endpoints cho Prometheus.

alternatives.rationale: gRPC cho internal microservice communication (lower latency). Flask khi team quen thuoc.

feasibility_score.summary: Linh vuc chin muoi ky thuat (TRL 8), nhu cau thi truong cuc cao (9/10) voi ngan hang VN mat $200M+/nam do gian lan va regulatory tailwind tu NHNN. Dieu kien: can pilot client ngan hang cung cap labeled data, batch-first architecture (streaming la Phase 2), tich hop SHAP explainability tu ngay dau, va xay Vietnam Anomaly Benchmark Dataset lam competitive moat.

technical_feasibility.rationale: Algorithms chin muoi (Isolation Forest, Autoencoders, Transformer) voi production-grade libraries (PyOD 40+ algorithms, Alibi Detect, River). Kien truc hybrid batch-train/stream-infer da duoc chung minh tai Netflix, Uber. Tru 2 diem cho do phuc tap streaming pipelines va model drift management.

market_demand.rationale: Ngan hang VN mat $200M+/nam do gian lan, tang 25%/nam voi digital banking. 8,000+ nha may can quality control. E-commerce 2.5 ty buu kien/nam. Global market $7.1B by 2028. NHNN mandate AI fraud detection truoc 2027. Tru 1 diem vi mot so client chua nhan ra can AI-based detection.

data_availability.rationale: Public benchmarks ton tai (KDD Cup, Credit Card Fraud, NAB, SWAT). Nhung Vietnam-specific labeled anomaly data cuc ky hiem. Ngan hang giu proprietary fraud data, khong chia se. Factory sensor data silo trong legacy SCADA/PLC. Can 3-6 thang partnership voi pilot customers de xay dataset.

implementation_risk.rationale: Alert fatigue tu false positive rate 30-50% (unsupervised). Streaming infrastructure (Kafka + Flink) can DevOps chuyen mon hiem tai VN (<200 senior engineers). Cold-start problem cho khach moi. Feedback loop (Stage 6) la thanh phan quan trong nhat nhung thuong bi danh gia thap effort.

vietnam_market_fit.rationale: 47 ngan hang thuong mai + 80 fintech. VietQR 180M+ giao dich/thang tao fraud vectors moi. Manufacturing FDI (Samsung, Foxconn) co budget tuong duong global. On-premise deployment dap ung data residency (Thong tu 13/2023/TT-NHNN). Tru 2 diem cho SMB willingness to pay thap va thieu labeled data.

conditions: It nhat 1 pilot client ngan hang cung cap labeled fraud data truoc khi commit xay full product
Bat dau batch-first architecture (PostgreSQL + PyOD + MLflow + Grafana, $500-1,500/thang). Streaming la Phase 2
Tich hop SHAP explainability tu ngay dau — bat buoc cho regulatory compliance NHNN
Xay Vietnam Anomaly Benchmark Dataset qua partnership voi pilot customers (3-6 thang)
Target <10% false positive rate truoc khi production deployment qua threshold calibration voi pilot
Tuyen 2 streaming engineers proactively cho Phase 2 (Kafka/Flink recruitment mat 3-6 thang tai VN)

industry_applications.use_case: Phat hien gian lan giao dich tai chinh
industry_applications.description: Fraud detection cho 47 ngan hang thuong mai VN + 80 fintech. VietQR 180M+ giao dich/thang tao attack surface moi. Isolation Forest + SHAP cho explainability. Semi-supervised voi historical fraud labels. Target latency <100ms cho real-time blocking.

industry_applications.use_case: Giam sat chat luong va phat hien defects tu dong
industry_applications.description: Predictive quality control cho 8,000+ nha may VN. Autoencoder tren sensor data (nhiet do, rung dong, ap suat, RPM). Giam defect rate 15-30%. Phat hien trong 5 giay de ngan unplanned downtime ($50K-500K/incident).

industry_applications.industry: Thuong mai dien tu & Logistics (E-commerce Anomaly)
industry_applications.use_case: Phat hien bat thuong logistics va gia ca
industry_applications.description: 2.5 ty buu kien/nam: anomaly detection cho delivery time prediction failures, pricing anomalies, fake review detection, inventory shrinkage. Batch daily detection du cho hau het use cases. Key players: Shopee, Lazada, Tiki, GHTK, GHN.

industry_applications.use_case: Phat hien bat thuong mang va gian lan SIM
industry_applications.description: 3 nha mang lon (Viettel, VNPT, Mobifone): network anomaly detection, SIM swap fraud, subscription fraud. Multivariate monitoring hang tram metrics mang dong thoi. Streaming pipeline voi Kafka + Flink.

industry_applications.use_case: Phat hien xam nhap va bat thuong bao mat
industry_applications.description: Log anomaly detection cho intrusion detection systems. Ket hop rule-based (SIEM) voi ML-based anomaly scoring. Graph anomaly detection cho lateral movement. SOAR playbook tu dong phan hoi. Dac biet cho co quan nha nuoc va ngan hang.

industry_applications.use_case: Giam sat he thong IT va phat hien su co tu dong
industry_applications.description: Prometheus metrics + log anomaly detection cho DevOps/SRE teams. Tu dong phat hien service degradation, resource exhaustion, deployment regression. Grafana dashboards voi anomaly annotations. Target: cong ty tech VN va FDI.

case_studies.title: Stripe Radar — Fraud detection cho hang trieu merchants
case_studies.problem: Phat hien gian lan real-time tren hang ty giao dich/nam voi false positive rate thap de khong block giao dich hop phap.
case_studies.solution: ML-based fraud scoring voi labeled historical data (semi-supervised). Ensemble models voi rule engine. Real-time scoring <100ms.
case_studies.results: Block $40B+ gian lan. False positive rate thap hon industry average. 89% merchants su dung Radar by default.
case_studies.tech_stack: Custom ML pipeline, real-time scoring, labeled feedback loop
case_studies.lessons: Semi-supervised voi feedback loop hieu qua hon unsupervised. Labeled data la competitive moat.

case_studies.title: Netflix — Anomaly detection cho streaming quality
case_studies.problem: Phat hien suy giam chat luong streaming tren hang tram trieu users, hang ngan microservices, nhieu regions.
case_studies.solution: Statistical anomaly detection (Robust PCA) + ML models tren time-series metrics. Kafka pipeline cho real-time. Custom Grafana dashboards.
case_studies.results: Giam Mean Time to Detect (MTTD) tu hang gio xuong phut. Tu dong rollback deployments co van de.
case_studies.tech_stack: Kafka, Flink, custom ML models, Grafana, Atlas (time-series DB)
case_studies.lessons: Hybrid statistical + ML hieu qua hon pure ML. Domain-specific features quan trong hon algorithm chon.

case_studies.title: Uber — Marketplace anomaly detection
case_studies.problem: Phat hien bat thuong trong marketplace metrics (demand/supply imbalance, pricing anomalies, driver fraud) real-time.
case_studies.solution: Argos platform: statistical anomaly detection tren millions of time series. Hierarchical detection framework. Multi-level alerting.
case_studies.results: Giam false positive rate 60%. Cover 10,000+ metrics tu dong. Detection latency <5 phut.
case_studies.tech_stack: Kafka, Apache Spark, custom statistical models, Hive, Presto
case_studies.lessons: Scale > sophistication: statistical methods tren nhieu metrics hieu qua hon deep learning tren it metrics.

key_papers.title: Isolation Forest
key_papers.authors: Fei Tony Liu, Kai Ming Ting, Zhi-Hua Zhou
key_papers.contribution: Nguyen ly isolation cho anomaly detection: anomalies it va khac biet, can it splits de co lap. Linear time, subsample-based. Thay doi paradigm tu profiling normal sang isolating anomalies.

key_papers.title: LOF: Identifying Density-Based Local Outliers
key_papers.authors: Markus M. Breunig, Hans-Peter Kriegel, Raymond T. Ng, Jorg Sander
key_papers.contribution: Local Outlier Factor: do mat do cuc bo tuong doi voi hang xom. Bat local anomalies ma global methods bo sot. 3000+ citations, foundational method.

key_papers.title: Anomaly Transformer: Time Series Anomaly Detection with Association Discrepancy
key_papers.authors: Jiehui Xu, Haixu Wu, Jianmin Wang, Mingsheng Long
key_papers.contribution: Association discrepancy la anomaly criterion moi: anomalies co weaker associations voi toan bo series. State-of-art tren 6 benchmarks. Minimax optimization cho Anomaly-Attention.

key_papers.title: Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes
key_papers.contribution: VAE framework: generative model voi learned approximate inference. Reconstruction probability la anomaly score tu nhien. Nen tang cho moi reconstruction-based anomaly detection.

key_papers.title: PyOD: A Python Toolbox for Scalable Outlier Detection
key_papers.authors: Yue Zhao, Zain Nasrullah, Zheng Li
key_papers.contribution: Unified API cho 40+ anomaly detection algorithms. MIT license. De-facto standard Python library cho outlier detection research va production.

key_papers.title: Deep Semi-Supervised Anomaly Detection
key_papers.authors: Lukas Ruff, Robert A. Vandermeulen, Nico Gornitz, Alexander Binder, Emmanuel Muller, Klaus-Robert Muller, Marius Kloft
key_papers.contribution: Deep SAD: ket hop one-class deep learning voi labeled anomaly guidance. Cai thien dang ke so voi unsupervised khi co it labels. Practical cho fraud detection.

key_papers.title: Alibi Detect: Algorithms for Outlier, Adversarial, and Drift Detection
key_papers.contribution: Production-grade library tich hop outlier detection + drift detection + adversarial detection. Backend cho Seldon Core. Drift detectors (KS, MMD, LSDD) la unique selling point.

key_papers.title: Estimating the Support of a High-Dimensional Distribution (One-Class SVM)
key_papers.authors: Bernhard Scholkopf, John C. Platt, John Shawe-Taylor, Alex J. Smola, Robert C. Williamson
key_papers.contribution: One-Class SVM: hoc decision boundary phan cach normal data khoi origin trong kernel space. Nu parameter kiem soat fraction of outliers. Foundational cho kernel-based anomaly detection.

key_papers.title: USAD: UnSupervised Anomaly Detection on Multivariate Time Series
key_papers.authors: Julien Audibert, Pietro Michiardi, Frederic Guyard, Sebastien Marti
key_papers.contribution: Adversarial training giua 2 autoencoders cho multivariate time-series anomaly detection. Nhanh hon va on dinh hon GAN-based methods. Ung dung cho IoT/industrial monitoring.

key_papers.title: A Comprehensive Survey on Graph Anomaly Detection with Deep Learning
key_papers.authors: Xiaoxiao Ma, Jia Wu, Shan Xue, Jian Yang, Chuan Zhou, Quan Z. Sheng, Hui Xiong, Leman Akoglu
key_papers.contribution: Survey toan dien ve graph anomaly detection voi deep learning: node, edge, subgraph, graph-level anomalies. Framework phan loai va so sanh methods.

cross_domain_connections.description: Forecast-residual anomaly detection: B01 du bao gia tri ky vong → B07 phat hien khi thuc te lech dang ke khoi du bao. e_t = y_t - y_hat_t. Du bao demand (B01) + phat hien demand anomaly (B07) cho supply chain. Ket noi manh nhat cua B07.

Computer Vision (B03) cho visual anomaly detection: phat hien defects san xuat, kiem tra chat luong san pham bang camera. Autoencoder/f-AnoGAN tren images. B03 cung cap feature extraction; B07 cung cap anomaly scoring framework.

B07 phat hien bat thuong → B06 re-optimize: phat hien machine failure (B07) → reschedule production (B06). Phat hien demand spike (B07) → re-route delivery (B06). Anomaly detection la trigger cho dynamic re-optimization.

NLP (B04) cho log anomaly detection: parse unstructured log text, extract patterns, phat hien log sequences bat thuong. PhoBERT cho Vietnamese system logs. B04 text understanding + B07 anomaly scoring.

Document Intelligence (B02) phat hien document anomalies: hoa don gia, chung tu gia mao, inconsistencies trong bao cao tai chinh. B02 extract structured data; B07 phat hien outliers trong extracted values.

Recommendation Systems (B05) cung cap user behavior profiles → B07 phat hien hanh vi bat thuong: account takeover, bot activity, rating manipulation. User embedding (B05) lam features cho anomaly detection (B07).

bestPractices: Bat dau voi Isolation Forest (PyOD) lam baseline cho MOI bai toan. Don gian, nhanh, it hyperparameters. Chi chuyen sang complex models khi IF demonstrably khong du.
Tich hop SHAP explainability tu ngay dau, dac biet cho banking vertical. NHNN yeu cau giai thich quyet dinh fraud detection cho auditors. Isolation Forest + SHAP la combo uu tien.
Batch truoc, streaming sau. Detection hang gio/ngay du cho 70% use cases voi 20% infrastructure cost. Streaming (Kafka + Flink) chi khi client yeu cau latency <1 giay.
Xay feedback loop (label true positive/false positive) vao sprint 1, khong phai 'them sau'. Khong co feedback loop, model suy giam trong vai tuan. Budget 30% engineering effort cho model maintenance.

Multi-level thresholds (Warning → Critical → Emergency) thay vi binary (anomaly/normal). Giam alert fatigue dang ke. Dynamic thresholds adapt theo seasonal patterns (ngay/dem, ngay thuong/cuoi tuan, Tet).
Benchmark lien tuc: do Precision, Recall, F1, ROC-AUC, va dac biet PR-AUC (class imbalance nghiem trong). KHONG dung accuracy — misleading voi ty le anomaly 0.1-1%.
Xay domain-specific feature engineering truoc khi tang model complexity. Rolling statistics (mean, std, min, max), rate-of-change, lag features thuong hieu qua hon deep learning voi features raw.
antiPatterns: Deploy deep learning (Autoencoder, Transformer) ma khong thu Isolation Forest + statistical methods truoc. 80% bai toan, simple methods du tot voi 10% effort.
Train anomaly detection model tren data chua loc — chua anomalies trong training data lam corrupted baseline 'binh thuong'. Phai dam bao training data predominantly normal.
Gia dinh unsupervised methods la 'plug and play'. Thuc te can 4-6 tuan configuration, feature engineering, threshold tuning cho moi domain. Set client expectations ro rang.
Bo qua concept drift — model trained thang 1 se degrade thang 6 khi patterns thay doi (mua Tet, promotion moi, infrastructure changes). Can drift detection va automated retraining.
Dung accuracy lam metric chinh voi ty le anomaly 0.1-1%. Model predict 'tat ca la normal' dat 99%+ accuracy. Dung PR-AUC, F1, Precision@k.
Streaming-first architecture cho market entry VN. Kafka + Flink can specialized DevOps hiem tai VN va $3,000-8,000/thang cloud costs. Margin am cho SMBs paying $500-2,000/thang.
Ignore explainability cho banking vertical. Black-box models (deep autoencoders) bi tu choi boi NHNN compliance. Uu tien Isolation Forest + SHAP hon Autoencoder cho regulated domains.

stages.name: Data Collection & Ingestion
stages.description: Thu thap du lieu tu nhieu nguon: sensors, transaction logs, system metrics, API events. Kafka cho real-time streaming, Debezium cho CDC tu databases. Schema registry (Avro/Protobuf), partitioning strategy, retention policy.
stages.inputs: Raw sensor data, transaction logs, system metrics, API events
stages.outputs: Cleaned, timestamped event stream + batch data lake

stages.name: Feature Engineering
stages.description: Tao feature vectors tu raw events. Online (real-time) va offline (historical). Rolling statistics (mean, std, min, max), rate-of-change, categorical encoding, lag features. Feast lam feature store dam bao consistency giua training va serving.

stages.name: Model Training (Offline)
stages.description: Train mo hinh tren historical data. Unsupervised: train tren 'normal' data only (Isolation Forest, Autoencoder). Semi-supervised: dung labeled set cho threshold calibration. Retrain frequency: weekly (stable) den daily (high-drift). MLflow track experiments.
stages.outputs: Trained model artifacts trong MLflow registry

stages.name: Inference & Scoring
stages.description: Scoring du lieu moi: anomaly score (0.0-1.0) + binary label + confidence. Real-time qua Triton/BentoML, batch qua scheduled jobs. Redis cache scores va features. Latency targets: <50ms (fraud), <500ms (sensors), <5min (batch).

stages.name: Threshold Management & Alerting
stages.description: Chuyen scores thanh alerts. Static (percentile), Dynamic (adaptive), Multi-level (Warning/Critical/Emergency). Route alerts qua Alertmanager den Slack/PagerDuty. Grafana dashboards voi anomaly annotations.

stages.name: Feedback Loop & Retraining
stages.description: QUAN TRONG NHAT cho long-term quality. Operators label true positive/false positive tu alert dashboard (Label Studio). Phan biet 'khong bat thuong' vs 'bat thuong nhung khong can hanh dong'. Retrain trigger khi du labels hoac drift detected. Drift detection qua Alibi Detect (KS, MMD tests).
stages.inputs: Human feedback (TP/FP labels), drift detection signals
stages.outputs: Updated training data, recalibrated thresholds, retrained models

learning_resources.title: PyOD Documentation & Tutorials
learning_resources.description: Tai lieu chinh thuc PyOD: 40+ algorithms voi unified API. Quick start, benchmarks, examples. KHOI DAU TOT NHAT cho anomaly detection.

learning_resources.title: Alibi Detect Documentation
learning_resources.description: Production-grade outlier detection + drift detection. Algorithms, deployment guides, integration voi Seldon Core. Pick cho production systems.

learning_resources.title: Anomaly Detection Learning Resources (CMU)
learning_resources.description: Curated list boi Leman Akoglu (CMU) — bao gom papers, tutorials, datasets, tools. Reference toan dien nhat cho linh vuc.

learning_resources.title: Outlier Analysis (Charu C. Aggarwal)
learning_resources.description: Sach giao khoa toan dien nhat ve outlier detection: statistical, distance, density, isolation, clustering, time-series, graphs. Nen tang ly thuyet.

learning_resources.title: Apache Kafka Documentation
learning_resources.description: Tai lieu chinh thuc Kafka: architecture, configuration, operations. Can thiet cho streaming anomaly detection pipeline.

learning_resources.title: Apache Flink Documentation
learning_resources.description: Stream processing framework: stateful computations, windowed aggregations, CEP. Core cua real-time anomaly detection pipeline.

learning_resources.title: Feast Feature Store Documentation
learning_resources.description: Open-source feature store: shared feature definitions, point-in-time joins, online/offline serving. Dam bao consistency giua training va serving.

learning_resources.title: Prometheus + Grafana Monitoring Stack
learning_resources.description: Monitoring va dashboarding stack: collect metrics, visualize, alert. Core cua monitoring layer trong anomaly detection system.

learning_resources.title: Kaggle Credit Card Fraud Detection Dataset
learning_resources.description: 284,807 transactions, 492 frauds (0.17%). PCA-transformed features. Dataset benchmark kinh dien nhat cho fraud detection. Quick start 30 phut.

learning_resources.title: Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB)
learning_resources.description: Benchmark cho streaming anomaly detection: 58 time-series voi labeled anomalies. Scoring framework chuan. Essential cho benchmarking streaming detectors.

learning_resources.title: River — Online Machine Learning Library
learning_resources.description: Incremental/online learning cho streaming data. Half-Space Trees, ADWIN, streaming anomaly detectors. Alternative cho PyOD khi can streaming.

learning_resources.title: MLflow Documentation
learning_resources.description: ML lifecycle management: experiment tracking, model registry, deployment. Track anomaly detection experiments, threshold configurations, model performance.

risks.name: Alert fatigue / Ty le false positive cao
risks.description: Phuong phap unsupervised san sinh 30-50% false positives, khien operators bo qua moi canh bao. Day la ly do #1 anomaly detection projects that bai trong production.
risks.mitigation: Multi-level thresholds (warning/critical/emergency). Uu tien semi-supervised voi human-in-the-loop feedback. Target <10% FP rate truoc production qua threshold calibration voi pilot.

risks.name: Cold-start problem — Khach moi khong co du lieu lich su
risks.description: Khach hang moi khong du historical data de train meaningful models. Can 2-4 tuan tich luy data toi thieu.
risks.mitigation: Transfer learning baselines theo nganh. Rule-based detection lam cau noi trong thoi gian tich luy data. Pre-train tren public/synthetic datasets va fine-tune tren customer data.

risks.name: Thieu du lieu bat thuong co nhan tai Viet Nam
risks.description: Vietnam-specific labeled anomaly data cuc ky hiem. Ngan hang giu proprietary fraud data. Factory sensor data silo trong legacy SCADA/PLC. Can 3-6 thang partnership de xay dataset.
risks.mitigation: Xay Vietnam Anomaly Benchmark Dataset qua partnership voi pilot customers. Dung synthetic data augmentation. Bat dau unsupervised, chuyen semi-supervised khi co labels.

risks.name: Do phuc tap streaming infrastructure
risks.description: Kafka + Flink can DevOps chuyen mon hiem tai VN (uoc tinh <200 senior engineers toan quoc). Chi phi $3,000-8,000/thang cloud cho moderate workload.
risks.mitigation: Phase 1: batch-only (don gian, re, du cho 70% use cases). Phase 2: streaming chi cho latency-critical (fraud, security). Xet managed Kafka (Confluent Cloud) giam operational burden.

risks.name: Concept drift / Model staleness
risks.description: Phan phoi du lieu thay doi theo thoi gian (fraud patterns moi, seasonal changes, infrastructure changes). Model suy giam accuracy trong vai tuan neu khong retrain.
risks.mitigation: Drift detection (Alibi Detect: KS, MMD, LSDD tests). Automated retraining pipelines voi MLflow. SLA: retrain trong 24h sau khi phat hien drift. Budget 30% engineering cho maintenance.

risks.name: Data privacy va regulatory compliance
risks.description: Du lieu ngan hang VN chiu quy dinh NHNN. Cross-border data transfer bi han che. PDPD (Nghi dinh 13/2023) yeu cau nghiem ngat ve bao ve du lieu ca nhan.
risks.mitigation: On-premise va private cloud deployment tu ngay dau. Data anonymization trong feature engineering pipeline. Tu van phap ly chuyen ve fintech VN. Chung chi PCI-DSS cho payment fraud use case.

metadata.notes: Consolidated by R-sigma (Ms. Scribe). Overall feasibility 7.3/10 CONDITIONAL GO. JSON field names English, values Vietnamese (non-diacritical) per language rule. Technical terms remain English.
